历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 11140 → 9724 → 9518 → 31002 (including special type of Radio and Television Directing) → 9704. In the past 4 years, regular class rankings stabilized in the 9500–11100 range, with a baseline of about 9704 in 2025. Provincial science/physics category enrollment plans: 1640 in 2021, 1511 in 2022, 1507 in 2023, 1518 in 2024, 1645 in 2025. In 2026, physics category 1272 + medical category 291 totals 1563, a decrease of 82 compared to 2025, a slight reduction of about 5%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 16th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, stable in the top 20 in recent years, belonging to a top comprehensive university in China. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is significantly negative, involving 51 incidents of teacher ethics, academic misconduct, etc. (46 negative), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking 35th (relatively hot), short video platform exposure is moderately high. Fifth round discipline evaluation: 19 disciplines rated A- or above, including Stomatology A+, Clinical Medicine A, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Mathematics A, Chemistry A, Pharmacy A, Software Engineering A, Light Industry Technology and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, etc., with balanced strength in medicine, humanities, and science/engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other majors continue to be highly recommended; Clinical Medicine, Stomatology recommended. In 2026, the estimated number of physics category candidates in the province is about 325,000, an increase of about 14% compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, the only 985 comprehensive university in the province, with a high proportion of local enrollment (1645 physics category in 2025), strong willingness of local candidates to apply, and significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 9704, a slight enrollment reduction of about 5% in 2026, an increase of about 14% in provincial physics category candidates, and the suppressive effect of negative reputation signals, it is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will slightly shift backward compared to 2025; predicted minimum ranking about 9614, range 9114–10114.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 7931 → 1690 → 3185 → 5117 → 4765, with significant fluctuations in recent years. In 2022, an abnormally low ranking occurred due to batch adjustments. In the past three years, it stabilized in the 3100–5100 range, with a baseline of about 4765 in 2025. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 323 in 2021, 306 in 2022, 296 in 2023, 314 in 2024, and 299 in 2025. In 2026, the history category enrollment is 366, an increase of 67 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 22.4%. The significant increase in slots helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 16th, having been stable in the top 20 in recent years, making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving 51 incidents related to teacher ethics and academic misconduct (46 negative), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 19 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A, Law A-, Archaeology A-, and Marxist Theory A, indicating profound humanities and historical foundations.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, the only 985 comprehensive university in the province, with a high proportion of local enrollment (299 in the history category in 2025). Local candidates have a strong willingness to apply, with significant regional preference. Chinese language/Chinese literature majors are socially recommended, law is in a wait-and-see phase, and journalism and communication are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the estimated number of history category candidates in the province is about 210,000, an increase of about 18% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4765, the significant enrollment expansion of about 22.4% in 2026, the increase of about 18% in provincial history category candidates, and the suppressive effect of negative reputation signals, the increase in slots from expansion roughly offsets the increase in candidates. The ranking is expected to shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5606, with a range of 5106–6106.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Sichuan University's medical category in Sichuan Province over the past five years are: 2021: 22819 (planned enrollment 288), 2022: 23592 (planned enrollment 300), 2023: 23215 (planned enrollment 300), 2025: 22824 (planned enrollment 290), with 2024 data missing. The overall ranking fluctuates within the range of 22800-23600, peaking in 2022 and then gradually declining, with 2025 approaching the low level of 2021. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 291, an increase of 1 person from 290 in 2025, an expansion of only 0.34%, which has minimal impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected as a national Double First-Class construction university (Class A). The university has strong comprehensive strength, with medical disciplines, especially stomatology, renowned nationwide. The West China Medical Center has a century-long history of running schools and enjoys extremely high social recognition and academic influence in the southwestern region and even nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been a popular direction for college entrance examinations. The stomatology and clinical medicine majors of Sichuan University's West China Medical Center have long been at the top level nationwide, with fierce competition for admission. The university is located in Chengdu, a central city in the southwestern region, which naturally attracts local candidates. In 2026, the medical category enrolls 291 students within the province, with a relatively stable enrollment scale, but the popularity of medical applications continues to rise, and the competitive situation is expected to remain unchanged.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the calculation results of the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and the analysis of historical ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Sichuan University's medical category in 2026 will be 22901, slightly lower (harder to enter) than 22824 in 2025, with a fluctuation range expected between 22557 and 23245. Candidates are advised to refer to this range to reasonably position their volunteer choices.
